latest.title: Forests make cooler air under the canopy
latest.script_key: forests can cool the air below them watch the shade and mist because leaves block direct sun and release water vapor that combination can make the forest floor feel like a different climate the canopy is a cooling machine not just cover which forest layer next

latest.title: Cows see red differently than you think
latest.script_key: cows don t see red watch the cow s eyes for the tell no squint no reaction even near that bright red bucket that s because cows are red green colorblind they see blues and yellows but reds look greenish or gray that s why farmers use blues and yellows for feed buckets
